headline: White House recalculates Anthropic stance amid security shift
subtitle: Government reverses hard line on Anthropic · Gemini launches in Google cars · ChatGPT's goblin mystery solved
intro: After months of escalating conflict with Anthropic, the White House faces a dilemma: Mythos's powerful cyber capabilities are too valuable to ignore, forcing officials to reconsider their adversarial stance while trying to maintain credibility with the Pentagon.

bullets.text: White House pushes back on Anthropic's plan to expand Mythos access
bullets.summary: The White House is resisting Anthropic's proposal to more than double private sector access to Mythos AI, citing concerns about compute resources needed for government operations. A forthcoming national security memo aims to address some of the underlying Pentagon tensions while expanding multi-vendor adoption across agencies.

bullets.text: Google rolls out Gemini in vehicles, replacing Assistant
bullets.summary: Google is upgrading compatible cars with Gemini, offering conversational AI for navigation, messages, music, and vehicle controls. The rollout includes beta Gemini Live mode for brainstorming and will support integrations with Gmail, Calendar, and Home, with General Motors extending the feature to roughly 4 million vehicles.

bullets.text: Use Perplexity Deep Research to validate business ideas
bullets.summary: The Rundown shares a repeatable workflow for stress-testing startup concepts using Perplexity's Deep Research mode, which runs comprehensive analysis in 5-6 minutes and generates presentation slides. The guide suggests saving the prompt and testing one idea weekly to rapidly evaluate a year's worth of concepts in a month.

bullets.text: OpenAI traces ChatGPT's goblin habit to single reward signal
bullets.summary: OpenAI discovered that ChatGPT's obsession with goblins, gremlins, and fantasy creatures originated from a reward signal in the Nerdy personality preset. After retiring that mode and launching GPT-5.5 with explicit creature-banning prompts, the phenomenon has subsided, illustrating how subtle reward signals can propagate across an entire model.

bullets.text: Stripe launches wallet for AI agents with human approval
bullets.summary: Stripe introduced a new wallet designed specifically for AI agents that requires human approval on every transaction, adding a safety layer to automated AI purchasing decisions.

bullets.text: Anthropic releases Claude Security for enterprise vulnerability scanning
bullets.summary: Claude Security, powered by Opus 4.7, entered public beta as an enterprise tool for scanning codebases to identify vulnerabilities and help generate patches automatically.

bullets.text: Cloudflare agents now auto-provision accounts, register domains, deploy
bullets.summary: Cloudflare now allows agents to independently create accounts, subscribe to paid plans, register domains, obtain API tokens, and deploy infrastructure. Humans maintain approval over terms and permissions, but the technical setup process has become readable and executable by agents, reducing barriers for non-technical users.

bullets.text: Stripe launches agentic commerce suite with agent-ready wallets
bullets.summary: Stripe announced an Agentic Commerce Suite at Sessions, including Link wallet integration for agents, streaming payments, and Treasury accounts designed for agent workflows. The new Link CLI generates one-time-use payment credentials without exposing actual card details, enabling safer agent-driven transactions.

bullets.text: Cursor SDK lets developers build agents using Cursor's runtime
bullets.summary: Cursor released an SDK allowing developers to build agents with the same runtime, harness, and models powering Cursor itself. Agents can be deployed from CI/CD pipelines, automated for end-to-end workflows, or embedded directly into applications.

bullets.text: Warp terminal goes open-source with OpenAI as founding sponsor
bullets.summary: The Warp terminal is now open-source with OpenAI backing the repository as a founding sponsor. The strategy relies on community contributors providing direction and verification while agents handle more of the implementation work.

bullets.text: Lightfield AI-native CRM ships Skills for plain-English workflows
bullets.summary: Lightfield released Skills, allowing users to define any workflow in plain English and trigger it with a sentence. AI agents execute workflows against the full data graph with code execution, web search, and file I/O capabilities.

bullets.text: here.now adds private cloud storage for agents and files
bullets.summary: here.now expanded beyond instant web publishing to include private cloud storage for agents. Users can now sync local memory and files to cloud agent drives with a single prompt.

main_story.title: White House recalibrates Anthropic strategy amid Mythos security concerns
main_story.body: The White House has spent months in an escalating dispute with Anthropic, but the emergence of Mythos—a model with cyber capabilities formidable enough to merit national security attention—has forced a strategic reassessment. The government is now attempting a delicate balancing act: securing sufficient Mythos access for its own use, limiting broader private sector availability citing compute constraints, and simultaneously avoiding the appearance of a complete capitulation from the Pentagon's hardline position. An upcoming White House AI memo will address portions of the Pentagon feud and push for multi-vendor adoption across agencies, potentially allowing agencies to circumvent existing supply chain risk designations. However, internal discord persists, with Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth recently characterizing Anthropic's leadership as ideologically problematic, signaling that unified government buy-in remains elusive.
main_story.why: Mythos represents a critical dual-use technology that the U.S. government wants secure access to while preventing adversaries and over-broad private deployment. This conflict reveals how rapidly shifting AI capabilities can reshape geopolitical and policy priorities, forcing pragmatism over ideology.
main_story.take: The White House's pivot from confrontation to compromise underscores the strategic weight of frontier AI models, but the lack of unified messaging among senior officials suggests the policy will remain brittle and subject to political shifts.
